vocab.meaning: những bức ảnh chụp tự nhiên (không diễn)
vocab.example: I have a preference for capturing candid shots of people because they reveal genuine emotions and spontaneous reactions.
Photography, for me, is about freezing a fleeting moment in time that would otherwise be lost forever.

vocab.meaning: những cảnh quan đẹp đến nghẹt thở
vocab.example: Whenever I go hiking, I make sure to document the breathtaking vistas from the mountain summit.

vocab.meaning: lối kể chuyện bằng hình ảnh
vocab.example: I try to create a visual narrative with my street photography, documenting the daily struggles and triumphs of city life.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen/hiệu ứng của ánh sáng
vocab.example: I am particularly fascinated by the play of light at golden hour, which adds a magical warmth to any landscape.

vocab.meaning: chụp ảnh cận cảnh (vật thể siêu nhỏ)
vocab.example: I've recently dabbled in macro photography to capture the intricate patterns on insect wings and flower petals.
I enjoy taking black-and-white photos of old neighborhoods because they evoke nostalgia for a bygone era.
To add an artistic flair to my work, I often experiment with unusual angles and long exposure settings.
Being an enthusiastic shutterbug, I never leave my house without my mirrorless camera and a spare lens.
I love using long-exposure techniques to turn flowing waterfalls into a smooth, silky texture in my photos.
